title: Sidecar Body (Stage 3 derivation)
description: JSON Schema for the structured-output JSON returned by the body-derivation prompt. The skill renders the JSON into markdown sections (## Intent / ## Role / ## Inputs / ## Outputs / ## Side effects / ## Examples) in fixed order. Mirrors src-tauri/src/sidecar/backend_section_validator.rs requirements (Phase 14 revision Issue 6 — JS-fallback parity).

kind.description: Echoed from the frontmatter so the schema's conditional branches can fire. Must match the corresponding frontmatter.json kind value.

intent.description: ## Intent body. Substantive — what this node IS for, not bare placeholder text.

role.description: ## Role body. The node's responsibility surface.

examples.description: ## Examples body for UI L4 atoms. May be empty array at bootstrap (the '(none yet)' placeholder is rendered when empty).

inputs.description: ## Inputs body for backend kinds. Each entry is a string of >=5 chars (Phase 14 revision Issue 6 parity with backend_section_validator.rs — empty bullets cannot pass).

outputs.description: ## Outputs body for backend kinds. Each entry is a string of >=5 chars (Phase 14 revision Issue 6 parity).

side_effects.description: ## Side effects body for backend kinds. May be empty array (pure functions legitimately have none).

notes.description: ## Notes body for kind:flow contracts. Numbered invocation walkthrough.
